# GitHub Repository Metadata

Apply these in the repo's GitHub settings (About panel / repo settings).

## Description (short, ≤350 chars, paste into "Description")
Spoiler-aware, multi-agent House of the Dragon S3 companion. Built with Google ADK + a custom MCP server: transcribes official HBO promo captions, cross-references Fire & Blood for book-vs-show diffs, and enforces a per-episode spoiler guardrail. Fully offline-reproducible. Kaggle × Google AI Agents Capstone.

## Topics (paste into "Topics" — space/comma separated)
google-adk, mcp, model-context-protocol, multi-agent, agents, gemini, gradio, house-of-the-dragon, llm, ai-agents, kaggle, spoiler-free, python, generative-ai, agentic-ai

## Website / homepage field (optional)
Leave blank until the demo video is published, then set to the YouTube video URL.
